title: [Backport release-1.18] fix(operator): only hot-reload a sidecar for its assigned Configuration
body:
Backport of #10132 to `release-1.18`.

Backporting failed due to merge conflicts. Please resolve manually:

```bash
git fetch origin
git checkout backport-10132-to-release-1.18

# Reset to base, discarding the empty placeholder commit
git reset --hard origin/release-1.18

# Cherry-pick the merged commit
git cherry-pick -x -m 1 db2e2e21e5d30139963a52f8131da6acadb2827d

# Resolve the conflicts, then:
git add .
git cherry-pick --continue

# Force-push to replace the placeholder commit
git push --force-with-lease origin backport-10132-to-release-1.18
```
